title: Use hybrid data architecture
summary: Use separate JSON files by domain instead of one giant app-data.json.
reason: This makes it easier for ChatGPT to safely edit one domain at a time while keeping the project scalable.

title: Use year-to-month timeline zoom
summary: Global timeline shows years. Clicking a year expands into January through December. Clicking an item opens detail.
reason: Years are better for strategy, months are better for execution, and details are better for management.
